description: Complete power delivery chain from USB-C/MagSafe input to SoC power pins. 7 sequential stages. M3 MacBook Air (X2818/MLB).

stages.name: USB-C Input & Initial 5V
stages.description: USB-C connector supplies 5V default. Port controllers manage CC signaling and VBUS switching. MagSafe uses ACE3 (U5900) with F5600 fuse on DCIN connection.

stages.name: PD Negotiation & 20V Boost
stages.description: Port controllers negotiate USB PD to request 20V from charger adapter. CC communication on both USB-C ports.

stages.name: Charger -> PPBUS_AON
stages.description: Charger IC U5200 (RAA489901) converts USB-C/MagSafe input to PPBUS_AON. Battery connects via J5150/J5157 BMU connector with SYS_DETECT circuit.

stages.name: SVR AON -> PP3V8_AON
stages.description: U5700 multi-phase buck (30A ICC MAX, APN 351002645) converts PPBUS_AON to 3.8V always-on rail. Single most important rail. Current sense via U5910 (MAX41033ANT+) and U5950.

stages.name: PMU Distribution
stages.description: PP3V8_AON feeds both SPMU U7700 (OMIT_TABLE 998-23585) and MPMU U8100 (OMIT_TABLE 998-23524). Each PMU generates multiple buck and LDO outputs for SoC and peripheral power.

stages.name: Standalone Regulators & Load Switches
stages.description: UC300 (LN84243-1) and UC710 produce 5V and 3.3V from PPBUS_AON. Load switches gate power to IPD, LCD, and peripheral subsystems.

stages.name: SoC Power Domains
stages.description: Final rails reaching SoC U6000 (M3) pin groups. PCPU, ECPU, GPU, SRAM, Memory, VDD_FIXED, VDD_LOW, CIO domains.
